checks.name: Contract is selectable
checks.summary: Route selection uses only a structurally valid current work contract.

checks.name: Deterministic route decision
checks.summary: Selected exactly one route from an explicit route hint, activation keyword score, or single-route fallback.

claim_boundary: This result covers only the named local CLI invocation and the current files it loaded. It does not prove fixture coverage, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior.
residual_risk: This local command does not provide fixture coverage, suite automation, package publication, or code-contract validation.

routing_decision.summary: Inspect the target skill and close only after required checks pass.
